{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Dalton Foster original
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A [[Dalton Foster original]] is a type of gun.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
